context.label: Legacy of the Force / Caedus War

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends late post-Endor/post-NJO era covering Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Crucible-style late Big Three transition. Excludes the far-future Legacy comics except as future guards.
continuity.notes: Development deck. Keep separate from Disney canon and from earlier New Republic/NJO decks unless they are active in the same Saga stack.

content.fact: Centerpoint Station carries ancient superweapon significance and Corellian-system stakes rather than being a normal station.
content.injection: When Centerpoint appears, treat it as strategic and dangerous, not routine infrastructure. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Legacy of the Force / Caedus War.
Respect story-position bounds from Legacy of the Force Begins / Betrayal to Caedus Falls / Invincible.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.
content.notes: Generated development Lorecard pending human review.

content.fact: Flow-walking is an esoteric Force perception/interaction technique, not a general-purpose time-travel solution.
content.injection: Do not use flow-walking to freely rewrite events unless a custom branch explicitly establishes that rule.
